== Notes for [[Item:Q56588|Q56588]] ==

Nacido en México,Gobernador y Capitán General de Honduras,Caballero de Santiago desde 1587,murió en Guatemala .''''
--------------------
* Reference: [https://www.ancestry.com/family-tree/person/tree/11972161/person/889100106 Ancestry Genealogy] - [https://www.geni.com/projects/SmartCopy/18783 SmartCopy]: ''Sep 12 2018, 16:23:55 UTC''

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADBFE16D1EFBBFA9822EF79916C094E
geni:6000000007847569803

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
